_meta.name: Phoenix Omega — Animagine XL 4.0 txt2img manga (no PuLID — character identity NOT locked across panels)
_meta.description: Animagine XL 4.0 base render without PuLID-FaceNet. EmptyLatent + KSampler denoise 1.0. Generator replaces {{positive_prompt}} / {{negative_prompt}}. Use this when no reference portrait is yet available for the character cast. Character identity drifts panel-to-panel; for character-locked renders use animagine_xl_txt2img_manga.json (PuLID variant) with --reference-image. Sampler config matches Animagine's published recipe (28 steps / cfg 6.0 / euler / normal) for shojo/iyashikei/slice_of_life register.
_meta.derived_from: animagine_xl_txt2img_manga.json (PuLID variant) with nodes 10/11/12/13/14 removed and KSampler.model rewired from [12,0] to [1,0]

inputs.text: {{negative_prompt}}, text, words, letters, captions, watermark, signature, signs, writing, typography, text characters, font, lettering, logos, subtitles, calligraphy
